testcase.name: runScenario

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //p[text()='Dr. Amvrin Chatterjee']/ancestor::div//button[contains(text(),'Hospital Visit')] (tried for 30 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.38.0', revision: '6b412e825c*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.5' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.56, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Swetha\AppData\Loc...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:50257}, goog:processID: 16092, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:50257/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.56, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: c12d2b33de1d48e1bcf03fef5c433db9

testcase.error: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //p[text()='Dr. Amvrin Chatterjee']/ancestor::div//button[contains(text(),'Hospital Visit')] (tried for 30 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.38.0', revision: '6b412e825c*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.5' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.56, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Swetha\AppData\Loc...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:50257}, goog:processID: 16092, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:50257/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.56, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: c12d2b33de1d48e1bcf03fef5c433db9 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at com.apollo247.testing.pages.SearchDoctorPage.SelectDoctor(SearchDoctorPage.java:209) at com.apollo247.testing.stepdefinitions.search.selectDoctor(search.java:52) at ✽.user selects doctor "Dr. Amvrin Chatterjee"(file:///D:/apollo247-Test-Sprint/./src/test/java/com/apollo247/testing/features/FindDocter.feature:12)
